headline: A Look At Verizon Communications (VZ) Valuation As Governance Activism And Analyst Downgrades Shape Sentiment
summary: Investor attention around Verizon Communications (VZ) has picked up as shareholder groups challenge the company’s governance and climate oversight ahead of the May 2026 annual meeting, coinciding with cautious sentiment after recent analyst commentary and insider activity. See our latest analysis for Verizon Communications.
